title: Images required to follow basic and alternative protocol
author: Schmidt, Alfonso
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These images are available to provide material for running the protocol and benchmarking the results. 
 For  QuPath Image Processing , you will find three uninfected images and three treated images. (Inf-1, Inf-2, Inf-3 Uninf-1, Uninf-2, Uninf-3) 
 For  Whole-Section Image Processing , you will find a complete whole-slide scan intended to demonstrate the protocol and its outcomes. ( eg Tumour.vsi)
steps_raw:
